title: Total Light✨
description: This texture pack boosts the game’s overall lighting, letting you see clearly 💧 underwater, ⛏️ in caves, and 🌙 during the night
body:
![banner tl](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a1b9eb44bafca224bd4b21a1c50fd4401735d2d_0.webp)

Brighten your entire Minecraft world with ✨ Total Light ✨! This texture pack boosts the game’s overall lighting, letting you see clearly 💧 underwater, ⛏️ in caves, and 🌙 during the night. Say goodbye to darkness and explore every corner of your world with clarity and confidence!

✨ Features:

- 💡 Brightness Boost: Increases global visibility, making dark areas easy to explore.
- 🌊 Underwater Vision: See perfectly in the depths of rivers and oceans.
- 🕳️ Clear Caves: Navigate caves and mines with full visibility.
- 🌃 Radiant Nights: Move through the night as if it were daytime — no torches needed!
- 🎨 Compatible with Other Packs: Works smoothly alongside other resource packs.

⚙️ Requirements:

OptiFine: This texture pack requires OptiFine to function properly.
